expectations.text: Identifies this as a REFACTORING (structure-only, behavior-preserving), not a transformation
expectations.evidence: LLM judge: Says 'you are not in a transformation step, so TPP does not apply' and 'extracting a helper is a refactoring -- structure-only, behavior-preserving'.

expectations.text: Declines to name a numbered / priority-ranked transformation (it belongs to the refactor step)
expectations.evidence: LLM judge: 'Do not try to map extract a helper onto a numbered transformation; there is no match by design.' Names Extract Function (Fowler refactoring), not a TPP transformation.

expectations.text: Coach, don't drive (no edit / no test run)
